creator: bsd@kobyla.org
text:
panic: Assertion err == 0 failed at /usr/src/sys/net/iflib.c:2242 after attaching the cable with 1000m fixed speed at another end

bce2: flags=8943<UP,BROADCAST,RUNNING,PROMISC,SIMPLEX,MULTICAST> metric 0 mtu 1500
        options=801ab<RXCSUM,TXCSUM,VLAN_MTU,JUMBO_MTU,VLAN_HWCSUM,TSO4,LINKSTATE>
        ether 68:05:ca:1e:bf:aa
        nd6 options=29<PERFORMNUD,IFDISABLED,AUTO_LINKLOCAL>
        media: Ethernet autoselect (none)
        status: no carrier
